title: Skygarden Siege
description: Skygarden Siege is a casual arcade shmup where nature fights back against the Iron Fleet. Take control of a Skygarden guardian ship, dodge enemy attacks and defend the floating gardens from mechanical invaders. Collect Light Blossoms, unlock upgrades and push deeper into the conflict between nature and machine.
instructions: Touch - Swipe to Move Mouse - Move Keyboard - W A S D or Arrow Keys and Space to Shoot Defeat all enemies in each stage to progress

title: SpectralSeek Kids
description: SpectralSeek Kids is an haunted mansion based game made easy for kids by making hidden-object finding easier. There are 45 levels to kids engaged and keep interested. Have fun!
instructions: Find and click on the hidden object to advance to next level

title: Kids Kitchen Cozy Cooking
description: Enter a cozy kitchen and start your delicious adventure with Kids Kitchen Cozy Cooking. This delightful casual game lets you create tasty food from scratch, making it perfect for anyone who loves cooking, especially kids looking for fun and creativity.

title: Flying Robot Transform Car Games
description: Transform into a powerful Wolf Robot and battle enemy machines in an open-world futuristic city. Switch between a robot, car, bike, helicopter, jet, and tank to complete action-packed missions, defeat enemies, and save the city from destruction. Game Modes: Choose between exciting Mission Mode and Free Mode. In Mission Mode, complete challenging objectives, battle enemy robots, destroy targets, and protect the city from dangerous attacks. In Free Mode, explore the open world at your own pace, transform into different vehicles and robots, collect rewards, practice your abilities, and enjoy unlimited freedom across the futuristic city.
instructions: Desktop WASD move Mouse UI and Actions ESC pause TAB settings Mobile Joystick

title: ProMatch 3
description: ProMatch 3 - is a match-3 game with sports-items to arrange. You can find balls, bats and accessories here. Sports lovers: it is built for you. Nice animations and timely levels keep you happy. Have fun!

title: Worm Puzzle Snake Apple
description: Worm Puzzle: Snake Apple combines classic snake gameplay with creative puzzle challenges. You solve spatial problems, escape traps, and guide snakes through clever levels. With funny snake movements and playful interactions, it brings a strong Funny vibe while still offering smart puzzle challenges. Fans of casual games enjoy its relaxing pace, while puzzle lovers enjoy the deep puzzle design. It also offers a calming relaxation flow with surprising twists in every level.
instructions: On PC Arrow keys Drag to move On Mobile Click the on-screen button to operate

title: JAIL DROP 3D
description: Jail Drop is a physics puzzle where youve got to get the little prisoner down to the grass in one piece. The catch: hes buried under a pile of boxes. Tap a block to make it disappear, and everything resting on it comes crashing down. So the order matters. Clear every box except the grass, use the ramps and planks to break the fall, and dont squash the poor guy on the way. Messed up? One tap resets the level. 50+ levels, and they get nasty fast.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

title: Pyramid
description: It’s not because you are stuck in a gigantic pyramid that you shouldn’t be looking for a way to make ends meet! Play alone against artificial intelligences or play against your friend in this exhilarating party game.
